note: Will Sawyer sequence blast: same subject+body sent to many DISTINCT recipients within minutes. These are DISTINCT sends — recipient-overlap component must prevent merging.

rows.subject: Internal resource allocation
rows.body_preview: Hi Jonatan, Most industrial inspection teams we talk to don't have a labelling problem, they have an expert-time problem. Quality engineers and domain specialists are expensive and limited, and they end up reviewing far more data than they need to. Active learning helps here: instead of having exper
